reason: Node 1.5 declares NO dependencies in the proof graph (af reports 'Dependencies: (none)'), yet its argument rests on nodes 1.1 (||S||<=3), 1.1.1 (||Phi||=1), 1.1.2 (submultiplicativity/triangle), 1.2 (||R-I||<=C eta), AND on node 1.3 for the load-bearing OPENING identity P=(I+SR)/2. The first equation P-Phi=(I+SR)/2-(I+S)/2 substitutes P=(I+SR)/2; that R=(S^2)^(-1/2) and that the spectral construction P=theta(2Phi-I) equals (I+SR)/2 (i.e. sgn(S)=SR) is established ONLY in node 1.3 (sgn(S):=SR, P=(I+sgn(S))/2). Node 1.5 neither cites node 1.3 in prose nor declares it (or any node) as a graph edge. Without node 1.3 the opening identity is unsupported, and the DAG does not record 1.5's actual dependency chain. Declare 1.3 (and 1.1, 1.1.1, 1.1.2, 1.2) as dependencies.
